svg.aria-label: Hi, I'm Bárbara — Half AI, half factory floor — zero pretending I have it all sorted. A PhD and 7+ years fixing factories, then a giant left-turn into AI product management. Now I build AI that has to survive a real factory floor, not just look good in a slide deck. These days: Building all the projects I could never dream of building before; Discovering what works, and what fails; Figuring out myself and my path — just having fun 🍟
svg.text: Half AI, half factory floor — zero pretending I have it all sorted.
A PhD and 7+ years fixing factories, then a giant left-turn into AI product management.
Now I build AI that has to survive a real factory floor, not just look good in a slide deck.
Building all the projects I could never dream of building before
Discovering what works, and what fails
Figuring out myself and my path — just having fun 🍟
